iree_add_all_subdirs()

  NAME
    lit_test
  SRCS
    "iree-benchmark-loom_test.txt"
  TOOLS
    ::iree-benchmark-loom
    FileCheck
  DATA
    testdata::duplicate_symbol.loom
    testdata::scalar_benchmarks.loom
  LABELS
    "hostonly"
)

    "driver=vulkan"
    "manual"
    "requires-gpu-vulkan"
)

### BAZEL_TO_CMAKE_PRESERVES_ALL_CONTENT_BELOW_THIS_LINE ###

option(IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_ENABLE_AMDGPU
  "Link the AMDGPU HAL execution provider into iree-benchmark-loom." ON)
option(IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_ENABLE_IREEVM
  "Link the IREEVM execution provider into iree-benchmark-loom." ON)
option(IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_ENABLE_SPIRV
  "Link the SPIR-V Vulkan HAL execution provider into iree-benchmark-loom." ON)

iree_package_name(_IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_PACKAGE_NAME)
set(_IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_TARGET "${_IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_PACKAGE_NAME}_iree-benchmark-loom")

function(_iree_benchmark_loom_enable_provider _target _definition _library)
  target_compile_definitions(${_target} PRIVATE
    ${_definition}=1
  )
  target_link_libraries(${_target} PRIVATE
    ${_library}
  )
endfunction()

if(IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_ENABLE_AMDGPU)
  _iree_benchmark_loom_enable_provider(
    ${_IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_TARGET}
    IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_HAVE_AMDGPU
    loom::src::loom::target::arch::amdgpu::provider
  )
  target_link_libraries(${_IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_TARGET} PRIVATE
    loom::src::loom::tooling::target::amdgpu::artifact_provider
  )
endif()

if(IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_ENABLE_IREEVM)
  _iree_benchmark_loom_enable_provider(
    ${_IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_TARGET}
    IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_HAVE_IREEVM
    loom::src::loom::tooling::target::ireevm::provider
  )
endif()

if(IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_ENABLE_SPIRV)
  _iree_benchmark_loom_enable_provider(
    ${_IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_TARGET}
    IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_HAVE_SPIRV
    loom::src::loom::target::arch::spirv::provider
  )
  target_link_libraries(${_IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_TARGET} PRIVATE
    loom::src::loom::tooling::target::spirv::artifact_provider
  )
endif()

unset(_IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_TARGET)
unset(_IREE_BENCHMARK_LOOM_PACKAGE_NAME)
